answer: iPayX provides an MCP server for FX audits that includes free, self-serve access options [1][2]. You can use the MCP server for mid-market rate lookups without an API key [2]. For live provider comparisons and full forensic reports, you can obtain a free API key via the iPayX website [2]. The service is integrated through MCP-compatible AI clients by configuring the server using the endpoint at https://mcp.ipayx.ai/mcp [3]. While basic usage is free, some advanced reporting features require a token and are billed per report [1][4][5].
